visual_language: impasto oil painting, thick visible brushstrokes, floral eye motifs, layered color washes, vibrant chromatic palette
encounter: The viewer enters a living painted canvas — enormous brushstroke washes of orange, purple, and deep blue form the background. A central floral eye motif anchors the top, petals radiating outward. Collections emerge as paint-layered panels, each framed by fur-like stroke clusters and leaf shapes.
intent: Evoke the tactile richness of a painterly cat portrait — every surface feels built from pigment, every heading is a brushstroke, every artwork tile floats on a wash of layered color.

components.description: Central floral eye motif with radiating petal SVGs and brushstroke wash background
Paint-textured collection cards with fur-stroke borders and leaf accents
Individual artwork in a thick paint-framed tile with hover shimmer
